items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-95 northbound between .3 miles south of Exit 25: ALLEGHENY AVE/CASTOR AVE and .1 miles north of Exit 25: ALLEGHENY AVE/CASTOR AVE. There is a lane restriction.
